response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, including Java and JVM-related work in past roles, but his recent focus is heavily on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with minimal evidence of deep, current involvement in enterprise Java/Kotlin tooling, Spring, or IDE internals — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Proven experience with Java in past roles (e.g., NI LabWindows, robotic arms)
Strong track record in developer tooling and open-source contributions
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: Recent work is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js, not JVM or enterprise Java/Kotlin
No clear evidence of recent work on IDE internals, build tools, or application server integration
Lack of demonstrated deep Spring ecosystem or Kotlin experience
